name: Lucky Find
flavor: A traveler stumbles on a forgotten cache.

name: Forager's Bounty
flavor: Wild berries thicken on the southern slopes.

name: Salvaged Tools
flavor: Old tools, still sharp enough to swing.

name: Wandering Scholar
flavor: He left behind a notebook and three good ideas.

name: Quarryman's Gift
flavor: Two cartloads of cut stone, no questions asked.

name: Stray Horses
flavor: A small herd, wild-eyed but willing.

name: Festival Day
flavor: Music, then bread, then more music.

name: Smith's Apprentice
flavor: A clever child finds a use for every scrap.

name: Insightful Dream
flavor: A vision arrives in the night, bright as a forge.

name: Market Closed
flavor: The stalls are bare; the merchants ride out tomorrow.

name: Penny Pinchers
flavor: The council demands frugality this season.

name: Foe Repulsed
flavor: Scouts scatter the enemy vanguard before they take ground.

name: Tribute Forgiven
flavor: An envoy, charmed, departs without his usual demand.

name: Caravan Tax
flavor: Toll keepers had a profitable week.

name: Lumber Drive
flavor: The river runs thick with logs.

name: Iron Vein
flavor: A glint in the cliff face, then a strike.

name: Hunter's Camp
flavor: Smoke on the ridge — game is plentiful this season.

name: Inventor at Court
flavor: She drew her schematics on tavern napkins.

name: Worker Surge
flavor: A bright-faced volunteer arrives with their tools.

name: Council Speech
flavor: The Chief promises bread and means it, this time.

name: Forge Day
flavor: Sparks fly from every workshop until dusk.

name: Sharpened Blades
flavor: The smiths work through the night.

name: Calm Skies
flavor: A quiet week. Everyone needed it.

name: Eureka
flavor: Three problems at once, three solutions.
